message:
🐛 Scroll terminals to bottom after tile mount/resize (#137)

Add scrollToBottom() calls after fitAddon.fit() in:
- Tile mounting (initial and rAF retry)
- Single-mode remount from tile mode
- Active tab focus handler

Fixes tiles showing old output but hiding the prompt/text entry area.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
